CHANGE_PASSWORD_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Context binding mapping the account security Password Modification engine servlet.

Path definition tracking account security Password Modification view page.
changePassword(Long, String, String) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Changes user password.
ChangePasswordCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
ChangePasswordCtl handles password change functionality for logged-in users.

checkByCourseName(Long, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Validates or searches for conflict using Course ID and Exam Date.
checkByExamTime(Long, Long, String, Date, String, String) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Exhaustively validates cross-parameters to catch overlaps on specific time and description scopes.
checkBySemester(Long, Long, String, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Checks if a specific dynamic context exists targeting Course, Subject, Semester, and Exam Date.
checkBySubjectName(Long, Long, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Checks if a specific subject under a course already has an exam scheduled on the given date.
chemistry - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.MarksheetBean
Stores chemistry marks
city - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CollegeBean
City where the college is located
closeConnection(Connection) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.JDBCDataSource
Overloaded fallback handling quick structural cleanups across target standalone connections.
closeConnection(Connection, Statement) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.JDBCDataSource
Overloaded fallback handling quick structural cleanups across base operations that bypass traditional ResultSet allocations.
closeConnection(Connection, Statement, ResultSet) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.JDBCDataSource
Safely frees standard operational connection artifacts, dealing directly with explicit null safety verification logic checks.
